query: Could you help create a travel itinerary for a solo trip departing from St. Louis and covering 2 cities in Florida over the course of 5 days, from March 15th to March 19th, 2022? The travel budget is set at $2,900.

plan.transportation: F4003647, from St. Louis to Orlando
plan.accommodation: Private furnished bedroom in Williamsburg, Orlando

plan.attraction: Universal Orlando Resort;The Wheel at ICON Park;The Simpsons Ride;The Wizarding World of Harry Potter - Diagon Alley;The Wizarding World of Harry Potter - Hogsmeade;Harry Potter and the Forbidden Journey;Madame Tussauds Orlando;Ripley's Believe It or Not!;WonderWorks Orlando;Orlando Starflyer;Orlando Science Center;Orlando Starflyer;
plan.accommodation: Private furnished bedroom in Williamsburg, Orlando

plan.accommodation: Private furnished bedroom in Williamsburg, Orlando
